rationale: Elec. Code §253.154 governs write-in candidacy political contributions; it has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A write-in candidate for judicial office or a specific-purpose committee for supporting a write-in candidate for judicial office may not knowingly accept a political contribution before the candidate files a declaration of write-in candidacy.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns election law write-in candidacy, unrelated to property tax homestead exemption.
